repositories.name: gitprofolio
repositories.description: GitProfolio is an Astro-based web application that transforms a GitHub profile into a structured, enriched JSON portfolio. It fetches profile and repository data from the GitHub API, analyzes repositories (README parsing, tech stack detection, live links), scores and ranks projects using heuristics, and outputs a clean, standardized JSON format.
repositories.clean_description: GitProfolio is an Astro-based web application that transforms a GitHub profile into a structured, enriched JSON portfolio. It fetches profile and repository…
repositories.readme_summary: Transform your GitHub profile into a structured, enriched JSON portfolio.
readme_features: 🔍 Fetch GitHub profile & repositories
🧠 Analyze repositories using:
README parsing
Tech stack detection
Live demo link extraction
📊 Score and rank projects using heuristics

repositories.name: swiftmedia
repositories.description: Browser-based media toolkit — compress images, videos, and PDFs, merge PDFs, and convert images to PDF, all without uploading to a server.
repositories.clean_description: Browser-based media toolkit — compress images, videos, and PDFs, merge PDFs, and convert images to PDF, all without uploading to a server.
repositories.readme_summary: > Browser-based media toolkit — compress images, videos, and PDFs, merge PDFs, and convert images to PDF, all without uploading to a server.
readme_features: Image Compression — Reduce image file sizes while preserving quality (JPEG, PNG, WebP)
Video Compression — Compress MP4 and other video formats in-browser via FFmpeg WebAssembly
PDF Compression — Shrink PDF file sizes for easier sharing
Merge PDFs — Combine multiple PDF files into a single document
Image to PDF — Convert one or more images into a PDF file
Animated, accessible UI powered by Framer Motion

Favicon Generator — Generic favicon generator with live preview

repositories.name: atsprecise
repositories.description: AI-powered ATS resume evaluator — upload your resume, paste a job description, and get a precise compatibility score with keyword gap analysis and improvement guidance.
repositories.clean_description: AI-powered ATS resume evaluator — upload your resume, paste a job description, and get a precise compatibility score with keyword gap analysis and…
repositories.readme_summary: > AI-powered ATS resume evaluator — upload your resume, paste a job description, and get a precise compatibility score with keyword gap analysis and improvement guidance.
readme_features: Resume Upload — Supports PDF and DOCX formats (parsed with mammoth + unpdf)
Job Description Input — Paste any job description for targeted evaluation
ATS Score Engine — Weighted scoring across keyword match, skills alignment, section completeness, and formatting quality
Keyword Gap Analysis — Highlights missing keywords and over-used filler phrases
Section-by-Section Feedback — Detailed breakdown for Summary, Experience, Skills, and Education sections
Improvement Suggestions — Role-specific, prioritized recommendations to raise your score

repositories.name: job-hunter-web
repositories.description: Personal job intelligence dashboard — aggregates jobs every 4 hours from multiple platforms, scores them by hiring probability, and sends Telegram alerts for top matches.
repositories.clean_description: Personal job intelligence dashboard — aggregates jobs every 4 hours from multiple platforms, scores them by hiring probability, and sends Telegram alerts…
repositories.readme_summary: > Personal job intelligence dashboard — aggregates jobs every 4 hours from multiple platforms, scores them by hiring probability, and sends Telegram alerts for top matches.
readme_features: Job Aggregation — Scrapes Indeed, Naukri, and Wellfound on a 4-hour cycle (6×/day)
Smart Deduplication — Merges duplicate listings across platforms using a hash
Match Scoring Engine — Scores each job 0–100% based on skill match, experience level, recency, location, and company type
Telegram Alerts — Sends notifications for high-match jobs (≥ 80%) after each scraping cycle via Telegraf bot
Dashboard — Minimal UI with Best Matches, Last 24 Hours, and Saved/Applied sections
Application Tracking — Save jobs and update status (Saved → Applied → Interview → Closed)

repositories.readme_summary: > A salary intelligence web app for job seekers — compare pay across roles, companies, and cities in the Indian tech market.

Compare pay across companies and city tiers
SEO-optimized blog with salary insights and career advice

Fast-loading, clean UI built for readability

repositories.name: flatmate
repositories.description: A calendar-first shared living app — track expenses, meals, tasks, groceries, and events together with your flatmates.
repositories.clean_description: A calendar-first shared living app — track expenses, meals, tasks, groceries, and events together with your flatmates.
repositories.readme_summary: > A calendar-first shared living app — track expenses, meals, tasks, groceries, and events together with your flatmates.
readme_features: Shared Expenses — Log, split, and track household expenses between flatmates with per-person breakdowns
Grocery Lists — Collaborative grocery shopping list with item assignment and status tracking
Meal Planner — Plan and log shared meals; OCR-powered receipt scanning via Tesseract.js
Task Manager — Create and assign household chores and recurring tasks
Household Calendar — Unified event and reminder calendar for the flat
AI Assistant — Google Gemini AI integration for smart household suggestions

repositories.name: job-scraper
repositories.description: Autonomous job application pipeline — scrape listings from LinkedIn, Indeed, and Naukri, get AI-tailored resumes per job, and track every application in Google Sheets.
repositories.clean_description: Autonomous job application pipeline — scrape listings from LinkedIn, Indeed, and Naukri, get AI-tailored resumes per job, and track every application in…
repositories.readme_summary: > Autonomous job application pipeline — scrape listings from LinkedIn, Indeed, and Naukri, get AI-tailored resumes per job, and track every application in Google Sheets.
readme_features: Multi-source Job Scraping — LinkedIn, Indeed, Naukri, and Glassdoor via JobSpy with keyword, location, and date filters
Deduplication — Skips jobs already present in the tracker by comparing job URLs
AI Resume Tailoring — Each job description is sent to OpenRouter (Llama 3.3 70B, free tier) which rewrites your base resume to match the JD
Google Drive Storage — Tailored resumes saved with structured naming ()
Google Sheets Tracker — Full application log with Company, Role, Location, Status, URL, and Resume link columns
Gmail Status Sync — Hourly workflow reads Gmail, AI classifies recruiter emails (Interview / Rejected / Offer), and auto-updates the tracker

repositories.name: calcalorie
repositories.description: A free calorie and macro calculator for fitness goals — built for the Indian diet.
repositories.clean_description: A free calorie and macro calculator for fitness goals — built for the Indian diet.
repositories.readme_summary: > A free calorie and macro calculator for fitness goals — built for the Indian diet.
readme_features: Calorie Calculator — Calculates TDEE (Total Daily Energy Expenditure) based on age, weight, height, gender, and activity level
Macro Calculator — Breaks down daily calorie targets into protein, carbohydrate, and fat grams
BMR / TDEE Guidance — Explains the science behind Basal Metabolic Rate and Total Daily Energy Expenditure
Blog — Articles on calorie deficit, Indian foods for muscle gain, BMR vs TDEE, and more
FAQ — Common questions about calorie and macro tracking
Dark mode support via
